title: Female Gamers' Experiences of Prejudice 2020
description: This dataset consists of 14 writings by female gamers on their experiences of prejudice. The participants were women who have faced prejudice, belittlement or criticism while playing video games or otherwise related to their gaming. In the invitation to write, the respondents were presented with some questions to help with writing.
